name: 3 Color Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 egg white or 1 egg worth of egg replacer (I think I used 2 eggs worth of egg replacer and it seemed too stiff; I ended up adding more stock)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions and garlic in the vegetable stock until tender.
2. Add mushrooms and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until most of the liquid has evaporated. Let cool.
3. Place all ingredients (onion mixture, spices, egg replacer) into a blender and blend until smooth.
4. Wash spinach and cook for 2-3 minutes in the pan used for cooking onions.
5. Steam cauliflower and carrots; mash them separately.
6. Combine spinach with 1/3 of the mushroom mixture and 1/3 of the breadcrumbs. Repeat with cauliflower and carrots, keeping them separate. Add some salt if needed.
7. Arrange the three mixtures in a loaf pan (or individual loaf pans) in the desired order.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes, or until firm. Serve hot or cold.
Notes:
This recipe is vegetarian or vegan pate, depending on how you prepare it. It's adapted from the Spinach Torte recipe in the "No Salt No Sugar No Fat Cookbook".
Yield: 2 small loaves (individual loaf pans, approximately 3x5 inches). Double the recipe to make one regular loaf and bake for a longer time.
